overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi video game showing a character in a spacesuit walking through industrial interior corridors and rooms. The environment features utilitarian metal architecture with green-tinted artificial lighting. The character moves steadily through doorways connecting a reception area, laboratory workspace, and transit corridor with an escalator.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial reception area with security checkpoint

events.description: character walks through double security doors entering the laboratory workspace

agents.ego_description: character walks steadily through an industrial reception area toward the laboratory entrance

entered.detail: metal counter with dark surface on the left side of the room
large cylindrical metal tank with pipes on the right side
double doors with metal frames leading to the next room
screen mounted on the wall displaying data
workbench with equipment visible through the open doors

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow industrial reception area with a counter on the left and a large tank on the right. The camera follows from behind as the character approaches and passes through a set of double security doors into a laboratory space ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: laboratory workspace with desks and equipment

events.description: character exits the laboratory through a single door into a transit corridor

agents.ego_description: character navigates between workbenches and lab equipment toward the exit

entered.detail: tall metal filing cabinet with multiple drawers
mechanical robot figure standing on the workbench
single metal door with frame leading to the corridor
computer terminal mounted on the wall near the exit

segments.scene_description: Inside the laboratory, the character walks past workbenches and a filing cabinet on the right, where a robot prototype stands. The space is filled with industrial equipment and computers. The character heads toward a single exit door on the far wall, passing a wall terminal before exiting into a corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: transit corridor with escalator and emergency stairwell

events.description: lighting shifts to warmer amber tones as character approaches the stairwell area
character slows slightly while approaching the stairwell entrance

agents.ego_description: character walks down a long corridor past an escalator and lockers toward an exit stairwell

entered.detail: simple metal benches lined against the right wall
stationary escalator stairs leading upward on the left side
illuminated exit sign visible in the distance above the stairwell
row of metal storage lockers against the right wall
yellow and white striped barrier near the stairwell entrance
doorway leading to metal stairs with green painted walls

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds down a long transit corridor with benches on the right and a stationary escalator on the left. The lighting shifts to a warmer amber tone as the character approaches an exit stairwell at the end. Metal lockers line the wall near a caution barrier as the character reaches the stairwell entrance with an illuminated exit sign above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a utilitarian industrial complex that transitions from a sterile reception area into a technical laboratory and finally a transit corridor. It begins by following the character through a narrow reception space past a counter and a large tank, moving steadily toward a set of double security doors. As the character passes through these doors, the scene opens into a laboratory filled with workbenches, computers, and a robot prototype before the camera tracks them toward a single exit on the far wall. The environment then shifts into a long transit corridor where the green-tinted lighting gives way to warmer amber tones, passing a stationary escalator and metal lockers. Finally, the camera follows the character past a caution barrier toward an illuminated exit sign marking the entrance to a stairwell.
